title: Dow Jones Today: Index Down on Chip Fight Fears
text: Concerns over trade restrictions with China and comments from Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell helped send the Dow Jones Industrial Average lower by 0.2%, or 64 points, Wednesday.

title: Travelers Publishes Its 2022 Sustainability Report
text: HARTFORD, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The Travelers Companies, Inc. (NYSE: TRV) today published its 2022 Sustainability Report, which discusses the inextricable link between the company's mission of creating shareholder value and its purpose of taking care of the people it is privileged to serve – its customers, communities and employees. The report features a number of corporate initiatives, as well as the company's latest reports consistent with the recommendations of the Task Force on Climate-re.

title: 2023 Travelers Championship Generates More Than $3 Million for Charity
text: HARTFORD, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The Travelers Companies, Inc. (NYSE: TRV) today announced that the 2023 Travelers Championship generated a tournament-record amount for charity – more than $3 million for more than 160 nonprofits. “History-making moments – both on and off the course – are what this tournament is known for, and as a PGA TOUR designated event, the 2023 Travelers Championship certainly lived up to that reputation,” said Alan Schnitzer, Chairman and Chief Executive Officer at Trave.

title: Travelers Announces the Start of the 2023 Travelers Championship
text: HARTFORD, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The Travelers Companies, Inc. (NYSE: TRV) today announced the start of the 2023 Travelers Championship at TPC River Highlands in Cromwell, Connecticut. This year's tournament, which is a PGA TOUR designated event with a tournament-record purse, features eight of the top 10 players in the Official World Golf Ranking, led by No. 1 Scottie Scheffler. title: Travelers Reveals Most Common Wedding Claims of 2022
text: HARTFORD, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The Travelers Companies, Inc. (NYSE: TRV) today revealed the most common wedding insurance claims of 2022.
